title: synth_intel_alm: Crash on design with inferred memory
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Unpack ```bram_wb8.v``` from the attached ZIP archive. Start yosys and execute following commands:

```
   read_verilog bram_wb8.v
   synth_intel_alm
```


## Expected behavior

The ```synth_intel_alm``` command should finish without yosys crashing.

## Actual behavior

Yosys crashes during ```synth_intel_alm``` with a thrown ```std::out_of_range```:
```
2.50.13. Executing AIGMAP pass (map logic to AIG).
Module bram_wb8: replaced 0 cells with 0 new cells, skipped 47 cells.
  not replaced 7 cell types:
       2 $_NOT_
       2 $_AND_
       8 MISTRAL_M10K
      24 MISTRAL_IB
       9 MISTRAL_OB
       1 MISTRAL_CLKBUF
       1 $__MISTRAL_FF_SYNCONLY

2.50.13.1. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

2.50.13.2. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

2.50.13.3. Executing XAIGER backend.
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::out_of_range'
  what():  vector::_M_range_check: __n (which is 9) >= this->size() (which is 1)
```

The backtrace:

```
(gdb) bt
#0  __GI_raise (sig=sig@entry=6) at ../sysdeps/unix/sysv/linux/raise.c:50
#1  0x00007ffff783b859 in __GI_abort () at abort.c:79
#2  0x00007ffff7e59911 in ?? () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6
#3  0x00007ffff7e6538c in ?? () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6
#4  0x00007ffff7e653f7 in std::terminate() () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6
#5  0x00007ffff7e656a9 in __cxa_throw () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6
#6  0x00007ffff7e5c3ab in ?? () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6
#7  0x0000000000e73a1d in std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::_M_range_check (this=0x144bb70, __n=9)
    at /usr/bin/../lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/../../../../include/c++/9/bits/stl_vector.h:1070
#8  std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::at (this=0x144bb70, __n=9) at /usr/bin/../lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/../../../../include/c++/9/bits/stl_vector.h:1109
#9  Yosys::RTLIL::SigSpec::operator[] (this=0x144bb48, index=<optimized out>) at ./kernel/rtlil.h:876
#10 (anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::XAigerWriter (this=0x7fffffffa1b8, module=0x1587070, dff_mode=false) at backends/aiger/xaiger.cc:284
#11 0x0000000000e6f49d in (anonymous namespace)::XAigerBackend::execute (this=<optimized out>, f=@0x7fffffffa6f0: 0x161a780, filename=..., args=..., design=0x1341120) at backends/aiger/xaiger.cc:796
#12 0x00000000005a006c in Yosys::Backend::execute (this=0x12d2298 <(anonymous namespace)::XAigerBackend>, args=..., design=0x1341120) at kernel/register.cc:644
#13 0x000000000059e247 in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x1341120, args=Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Python Exception <class 'gdb.error'> Cannot perform pointer math on incomplete type "std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >", try casting to a known type, or void *.: 
std::vector of length 128, capacity 128) at kernel/register.cc:316
#14 0x000000000059de7a in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x1341120, command=...) at kernel/register.cc:293
#15 0x000000000059ebd6 in Yosys::ScriptPass::run_nocheck (this=<optimized out>, command=..., info=...) at kernel/register.cc:415
#16 0x0000000000a67300 in (anonymous namespace)::Abc9Pass::script (this=<optimized out>) at passes/techmap/abc9.cc:410
#17 0x0000000000a64713 in (anonymous namespace)::Abc9Pass::execute (this=0x12c7d98 <(anonymous namespace)::Abc9Pass>, args=Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Python Exception <class 'gdb.error'> Cannot perform pointer math on incomplete type "std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >", try casting to a known type, or void *.: 
std::vector of length 160, capacity 160, design=<optimized out>)
    at passes/techmap/abc9.cc:270
#18 0x000000000059e247 in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x1341120, args=Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Python Exception <class 'gdb.error'> Cannot perform pointer math on incomplete type "std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >", try casting to a known type, or void *.: 
std::vector of length 160, capacity 160) at kernel/register.cc:316
#19 0x000000000059de7a in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x1341120, command=...) at kernel/register.cc:293
#20 0x000000000059eb1a in Yosys::ScriptPass::run (this=0x12d78e0 <(anonymous namespace)::SynthIntelALMPass>, command=..., info=...) at kernel/register.cc:402
#21 0x0000000000fa0dab in (anonymous namespace)::SynthIntelALMPass::script (this=0x12d78e0 <(anonymous namespace)::SynthIntelALMPass>) at techlibs/intel_alm/synth_intel_alm.cc:289
#22 0x0000000000f9f165 in (anonymous namespace)::SynthIntelALMPass::execute (this=0x12d78e0 <(anonymous namespace)::SynthIntelALMPass>, args=..., design=0x1341120) at techlibs/intel_alm/synth_intel_alm.cc:188
#23 0x000000000059e247 in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x1341120, args=Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Warnung: Type size unknown, assuming 1. Try casting to a known type, or void *.
Python Exception <class 'gdb.error'> Cannot perform pointer math on incomplete type "std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >", try casting to a known type, or void *.: 
std::vector of length 32, capacity 32) at kernel/register.cc:316
#24 0x000000000059de7a in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x1341120, command=...) at kernel/register.cc:293
#25 0x000000000066fa6c in Yosys::shell (design=0x1341120) at kernel/yosys.cc:1274
#26 0x000000000058e9ca in main (argc=1, argv=<optimized out>) at kernel/driver.cc:553

```



[bram_wb8.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/8341087/bram_wb8.zip)
